violations.description: Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Need chlorine and quat test strip.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed loose hanging debris from the ceiling by the 3 comp sink area.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed greasy substance on outside of vent hood.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed soiled towel in hand sink. Hand sinks must be used only for hand washing.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
